listitem.para: The current object. At output, the object is updated with the new settings.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: This command can be used to re-initialize the sequence. It can be executed several times in the lifetime of the object (but lowdisc_startup can only be executed once). The same sequence is generated, as if the object had just been created.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.para: In the following example, one creates a Halton sequence in dimension 3. After some vectors have been generated, a reset is performed so that the same sequence is generated again, without creating a new random number object.
